subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! The infinite bounty of the Lord is even as a flowing treasure and a boundless ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی فیض نامتناهی الهی گنج روانست و دریای
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love and unity, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
